      2. 
      One piece. Vol. 109: Egghead pt. 4.
      Author 
      Oda, Eiichirō, 1975- author, artist.
      Format: 
      Books
      Call Number: 
      GRAPHIC NOVEL YA F ONE V.109
      Publication Date: 
      2025
      Series: 
      One Piece series ; vol. 109.
      Summary: 
      "As Bonney learns the truth of what happened to her father and who was responsible, she burns with the fires of vengeance. But she'll need the help of Luffy and others if she wants to get the justice she deserves. Meanwhile, Dr. Vegapunk threatens to reveal the hidden history of the world!"--Viz.com.

      3. 
      One piece. Vol. 64, 100,000 vs. 10.
      Author 
      Oda, Eiichirō, 1975-
      Format: 
      Books
      Call Number: 
      GRAPHIC NOVEL YA F ONE V.64
      Publication Date: 
      2012
      Series: 
      One Piece series ; Shonen Jump Manga. vol. 64.
      Summary: 
      "With their queen dead, the people of Fish-Man Island carry on her will and hope to one day achieve her dream. But Hody Jones and the New Fish-Man pirates have other ideas, including ruling the kingdom themselves. The fate of Fish-Man Island will rest on Luffy's shoulders, but will he destroy it instead?"--Publisher. 650 0Pirates ǂv Comic books, strips, etc.

      One piece. Vol. 22 : Hope!! / Eiichiro Oda.
      Author 
      Oda, Eiichirō, 1975-
      Format: 
      Books
      Call Number: 
      GRAPHIC NOVEL YA F ONE V.22
      Publication Date: 
      2009 1997
      Series: 
      One Piece series ; Shonen Jump Manga. vol. 22.
      Summary: 
      When Crocodile's evildoing is exposed, the rebellion that will destroy Alabasta just might be averted...But the Baroque Works will do everything in their power to make sure that doesn't happen -- Even if they have to kill Princes Vivi! The Straw Hats are in for the fight of their lives to keep this evil Croc from getting his way!
